---
title: "A Beautiful Graphic"
author: "Var Kurapati"
---

Var Kurapati is a data maestro!

```{r}
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
ggplot(diamonds, aes(x = carat, y = price, color = clarity)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 1.2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "darkblue", se = FALSE, size = 1) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Diamond Price vs Carat Size",
    x = "Carat Weight",
    y = "Price (USD)",
    color = "Clarity Rating"
  )
```
